name: C2xInitPacket
title: C2xInitPacket
description: This function creates a new WLAN packet. Other functions can access to the newly created packet with the returned handle.
Protocol fields that are marked as InitProtocol in the protocol description are initialized.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Designator of the protocol, which should be used for initialization

return:
Handle of the created packet or 0
With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
